name: Skillet Arroz Con Pollo
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped red or green pepper
1/8 teaspoon to 1/4 teaspoon ground red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add oil and heat until it ripples. Add chicken pieces; cook until browned on all sides.
2. Move the chicken to one side of the skillet. Add the remaining ingredients and blend well. Place the chicken in the rice mixture. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, and cover. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Turn the chicken over; cover and simmer an additional 10 minutes, or until the chicken is fork-tender and juices run clear.
Nutritional info: per serving: calories: 400; fat 11 gm; sodium 420 mg; dietary exchanges: 2 breads, 3 meats; 2 vegetables; 1 fat.
